latestPosts.title: Big-O Notation in Java: Time and Space Complexity for Interview Problem Solving
latestPosts.description: A practical Java-first guide to Big-O notation for interviews. Learn how to analyze loops, recursion, collections, amortized complexity, and common mistakes with clear code examples.
latestPosts.excerpt: Big-O notation scares a lot of people because it often gets explained as math first and problem solving second. In interviews, that is backward. You do not need to sound like a theoretician. You need to look at code, est…

latestPosts.title: Sliding Window Pattern in Java: Efficiently Solve Array and String Subarray Problems
latestPosts.description: Master the sliding window pattern in Java for array and string problems. Learn fixed and variable-size windows, dry runs, and complexity analysis for optimal solutions.
latestPosts.excerpt: Introduction to the Sliding Window Pattern The Sliding Window pattern is a powerful technique used to solve problems that involve finding a subarray, subsegment, or substring in a given array or string that satisfies a c…

latestPosts.title: System Design: Building a Distributed Tracing Platform
latestPosts.description: Design a production distributed tracing platform with trace ingestion, context propagation, sampling, span storage, trace query, retention, tenant isolation, and cost controls.
latestPosts.excerpt: Metrics tell you that latency is bad. Logs tell you that something failed somewhere. Traces tell you which request went where, in what order, and where the time actually disappeared. That is why tracing becomes essential…

latestPosts.title: System Design: Building a Service Discovery Platform
latestPosts.description: Design a production service discovery platform with registration, health checks, heartbeats, client-side and server-side discovery, zone awareness, rollout safety, and failure isolation.

latestPosts.title: System Design: Building a Session Management Platform
latestPosts.description: Design a production session management platform with login sessions, refresh tokens, revocation, multi-device control, risk signals, expiry, and safe cache-backed validation.
